presets.name: Current Baseline
presets.description: Matches the current daily pattern: 15 minute morning runs starting at 7:30am, 5 minute 2pm pulses, and 7 minute 7pm runs offset by 10 minutes.

presets.name: High Summer Heat
presets.description: Use for extended 90-100°F full-sun days: a deeper early-morning pass plus short afternoon and evening support pulses.

presets.name: Germination / Seedlings
presets.description: Light, frequent surface moisture for new seed beds or tender seedlings. Reduce or skip once seeds are established.

presets.name: Rainy / Skip Watering
presets.description: Clears the daily schedule when rain has supplied enough water or the root zone is already wet.

presets.name: Cold Weather
presets.description: A single late-morning light run after the coldest part of the day; avoids adding overnight moisture.

presets.name: Fall Reduced
presets.description: Reduced water for cooler days: one moderate late-morning pass plus a short late-afternoon top-up.

presets.name: Frost Threat Flash
presets.description: Short pre-dawn/early-morning pulses for frost-threat events while staying inside the 4am-8pm run window. Best for emergency use only.

presets.name: Transplant Establishment
presets.description: Gentle repeated watering for newly planted starts while roots establish; taper down after the first week.

presets.name: Wind / Low Humidity
presets.description: Early deep watering plus a late-day pulse for dry, windy days without running into the evening blackout period.
